jd_text: We are seeking a strategic and high-caliber Vice President of Information Technology to spearhead our technological initiatives and ensure alignment with the organization’s long-term business objectives. The successful candidate will possess extensive experience in leading large-scale ERP implementations and complex infrastructure projects, combined with a strong acumen in digital transformation, emerging technologies, and artificial intelligence. This executive-level role is pivotal in driving innovation, operational excellence, and digital maturity across the enterprise. Core Responsibilities: Develop and execute a comprehensive IT strategy aligned with corporate vision and objectives, fostering innovation and operational efficiency. Lead the planning, execution, and governance of complex ERP deployments and infrastructure initiatives, ensuring project delivery within scope, time, and budget. Drive enterprise-wide digital transformation initiatives, integrating AI, automation, and advanced analytics to optimize business processes and enhance competitive positioning. Oversee cybersecurity, data governance, regulatory compliance, and risk management to protect organizational assets and ensure resilience. Cultivate and lead high-performing IT teams, promoting professional development, collaboration, and a culture of continuous improvement. Partner with executive leadership and key stakeholders to identify technological opportunities, evaluate emerging trends, and translate insights into strategic initiatives. Qualifications & Experience: Demonstrable success in managing complex ERP implementations and large-scale infrastructure projects within a global or enterprise environment. Deep knowledge of digital transformation strategies, including AI, machine learning, and automation applications. Proven leadership experience at the executive level, with exceptional stakeholder management and communication skills. Strong strategic thinking, problem-solving abilities, and a track record of delivering innovative technology solutions. Demonstrated ability to operate with utmost confidentiality and discretion at the highest levels of the organization. Educational Requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field is required. A Master’s degree (e.g., MBA, MSc, or related advanced degree) in Business Administration, Technology Management, or relevant discipline is highly preferred. Relevant professional certifications (e.g., PMP, CISSP, TOGAF, CISSP, or equivalent) are advantageous.
